view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for all resources to be available at the same time is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for all resources to be available at the same time is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that multiple resources, including venue, catering, and staff, are included in the booking process. The evidence from prior steps shows that the booking was confirmed with all necessary components, specifically indicated by the booking order evidence which confirms that two bookings were made concurrently, thus fulfilling the requirement for simultaneous availability. The linked use case explicitly states the need for these resources to be booked together, and the evidence supports this.
